channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Early Hearing Screening for Newborns in South Africa Remains Limited
item.description: In South Africa, thousands of babies are born with hearing loss every year, yet most are only diagnosed after the crucial early years for language development. Hearing loss is the most common sensory ...

item.title: Victor Osimhen Scores Winner in Istanbul Derby, Earns High Praise as Top Striker in Turkey from Former Besiktas Official
item.description: Victor Osimhen don show say him be the main man for Turkish football as e lead Galatasaray to 1-0 victory against their big rival Besiktas for the hot Istanbul derby on Saturday. The Nigerian striker ...

item.title: India Sets Sights on Olympic Gold Following T20 World Cup Triumph
item.description: India’s cricket team has once again made history by winning back-to-back T20 World Cups, marking their third overall title and the first time a team has defended the T20 crown successfully. The final,...

item.title: Mobile MRI Unit in Northern Manitoba Faces Staffing Challenges and Delays in Service Expansion
item.description: A mobile MRI unit introduced in Thompson, Manitoba, last June has struggled to retain staff and expand its service to The Pas, approximately 300 kilometres southwest. The unit, designed to improve acc...

item.title: Clumber Spaniel Bruin Crowned Best in Show at Crufts 2026
item.description: At Crufts 2026, held at Birmingham's National Exhibition Centre, a Clumber spaniel named Bruin achieved the coveted title of Best in Show. This year's competition attracted nearly 19,000 dogs from aro...

item.title: Mother praises daughter’s resilience after kidney failure and cancer recovery
item.description: Jennifer McNeill, 43, from Barking, east London, has spoken of her profound admiration for her nine-year-old daughter, Bay, who has endured life-threatening health challenges from a young age. At just...

item.title: Nelson Ngoma: Tanzanian IT graduate building a growing digital business
item.description: Nelson Ngoma, born and raised in Tanzania, is an example of young Tanzanians using technology to make real impact. He graduated from the University of Dodoma in 2019 with a degree in Information Syste...

item.title: Police maintain control amid Manila protest
item.description: On March 9, 2026, tensions rose during a protest in Manila, with police authorities reporting that they observed ‘maximum tolerance’ throughout the event. The demonstration, which coincided with Inter...

item.title: Experts question whether tax concessions for older Australians are worsening inequality
item.description: Australia's taxation system is facing scrutiny as experts warn it increasingly favours older Australians at the expense of younger generations. With housing prices soaring over the past four decades, ...

item.title: Linux Communities and EFF Debate Approaches to Age-Verification Legislation
item.description: Several major Linux communities, including Ubuntu, Fedora, and Linux Mint, are discussing how to respond to new age-verification laws like the California Digital Age Assurance Act. Ubuntu developer Aa...

item.title: Kalonzo Faces Political Pressure in Ukambani as Ruto Gains Support and Alternatives Emerge
item.description: Wiper Democratic Movement leader and former Vice President Kalonzo Musyoka is working to strengthen his influence in Ukambani ahead of the 2027 General Election, as he hints at a possible presidential...

item.title: NHS England reviews use of cross-sex hormones for 16 and 17-year-olds amid evidence concerns
item.description: NHS England has announced a temporary halt on new prescriptions of cross-sex hormones for 16 and 17-year-olds who are exploring their gender identity. The decision follows a review which found the exi...

item.title: NTC Confirms Telcos' Full Compliance with President's Directive for Free Communication Services to Middle East OFWs
item.description: The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) has assured the public of the swift and complete compliance by the Philippines' major telecommunication companies—Globe Telecom, PLDT/Smart, and DITO T...

item.title: U.S. Strike on Iran Targets Weapons Supply Supporting Russia’s War in Ukraine
item.description: The United States conducted a military strike on Iran targeting the regime's drone production and missile stockpiles, significantly disrupting its ability to supply weapons to Russia. Ukrainian Presid...

item.title: Jai Opetaia wins unanimous decision in Zuffa Boxing debut against Brandon Glanton
item.description: Jai Opetaia made a strong impression in his first outing under the Zuffa Boxing banner, facing off against American fighter Brandon Glanton. The bout went the distance, with Opetaia demonstrating supe...

item.title: Lorcia Cooper Celebrates Authentic Representation of Coloured Communities in New SABC2 Drama
item.description: Seasoned South African actress Lorcia Cooper, known for her roles on Backstage and Lockdown, is taking on a new character, Rochelle Booysen, in the SABC2 drama Paradys. Unlike her previous tough and c...

item.title: MHRA Investigates Two Fatal Cases Possibly Linked to Weight-Loss Injections in Northern Ireland
item.description: The Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA) has received reports of two deaths in Northern Ireland potentially linked to weight-loss injections, specifically GLP-1 medications such ...

item.title: Tanzania Prepares Strong Security Measures for AFCON 2027
item.description: Tanzania iko makini sana kuhakikisha AFCON 2027 inafanyika kwa usalama na taratibu stahiki. Kamati ya Taifa ya Maandalizi ya AFCON 2027 imeanza kutekeleza mikakati ya kuboresha usalama kwenye mashinda...

item.title: Madlanga Commission of Inquiry Continues Hearing Witnesses in Pretoria
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, chaired by retired Justice Mbuyiseli Madlanga, resumed proceedings in Pretoria on Wednesday. The commission is tasked with investigating allegations of criminality,...

item.title: Cornyn Holds Narrow Lead Over Paxton in Texas GOP Primary Ahead of Runoff
item.description: Senator John Cornyn has defied expectations in the Texas Republican primary, maintaining a close contest against Attorney General Ken Paxton. Despite concerns that Paxton would dominate with support f...
